title: Activity Register — Pivot
description: AR-REPORT-01 wide-event pivot over ClickHouse analytics.events. Switch the $group_by template var to regroup the table by ANY dimension (origin, operation, effect_kind, target_kind, target, source) live. The $effect_kind / $origin / $target dropdowns self-discover live values via SELECT DISTINCT. Byte measure uses sumIf(..., source='be') so fe_rum approximate rows never contaminate authoritative byte totals (AR-FE-03).

list.name: group_by
list.label: Group by
list.query: origin, operation, effect_kind, target_kind, target, source

list.name: effect_kind
list.label: Effect kind
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT effect_kind FROM events WHERE effect_kind != '' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY effect_kind

list.name: origin
list.label: Origin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT origin FROM events WHERE origin != '' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY origin

list.name: target
list.label: Target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT target FROM events WHERE target != '' AND $__conditionalAll(effect_kind IN (${effect_kind:singlequote}), $effect_kind) AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY target LIMIT 200

targets.rawSql: SELECT ${group_by} AS dimension, sum(requests) AS requests, sumIf(bytes_out + bytes_in, source = 'be') AS bytes_be, round(avg(duration_ms), 1) AS avg_ms FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(effect_kind IN (${effect_kind:singlequote}), $effect_kind) AND $__conditionalAll(origin IN (${origin:singlequote}), $origin) AND $__conditionalAll(target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) GROUP BY dimension ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time, sum(requests) AS requests FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(effect_kind IN (${effect_kind:singlequote}), $effect_kind) AND $__conditionalAll(origin IN (${origin:singlequote}), $origin) AND $__conditionalAll(target IN (${target:singlequote}), $target) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
